## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] React continues to consume FastAPI JSON, not CSVs or notebooks.
- [ ] Page behavior follows `docs/FRONTEND_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md`.
- [ ] Relevant loading, empty, error, and caveat states are handled.
- [ ] Frontend build or targeted verification is completed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if the durable API/page contract changes.
